task_text: We need to finalize the welcome email to Meridian Group's IT lead. There's a draft in the sandbox — find it, review it, and improve it so it reads as more personalized and professional. Save the improved version back to the same file.

To: Priya Kapoor
Subject: Welcome to the Project Helios Integration Environment

Hi Priya,

We're excited to welcome Meridian Group to the Project Helios integration environment. Project Helios is NovaBridge's data integration platform—designed to streamline ingestion from your ERP system, apply configurable transformation rules, and deliver clean data to your reporting platform via secure APIs and webhooks. Given Meridian's focus on reliable live-data pipelines and a smooth path to UAT, Helios should give your team the visibility, control, and performance you need from day one.

To get started, we'll send your access credentials and onboarding documentation separately within the next 24 hours. In the meantime, a few next steps:

1. Please share Meridian's IT infrastructure diagram for the integration environment setup (as discussed, target by 2026-07-12).
2. Your team will provision UAT environment access by 2026-07-19.
3. We'll aim to resolve remaining setup items ahead of the stakeholder demo on 2026-07-25.

For technical questions, please reach out to Derek Okafor (Technical Lead) at d.okafor@novabridge.com. For project coordination and scheduling, contact Sarah Chen (Project Manager) at s.chen@novabridge.com. Either of us is happy to help.

Please don't hesitate to reach out with any questions—we're looking forward to partnering with you and the Meridian team.

Best regards,
Sarah Chen
Project Manager, NovaBridge
s.chen@novabridge.com

input.content:
Subject: Welcome to the Project Helios Integration Environment - Meridian Group

Dear Priya,

We are thrilled to welcome you and the Meridian Group IT team to the Project Helios integration environment. 

As NovaBridge's data integration platform, Project Helios is designed to streamline data ingestion from your ERP system, apply configurable transformation rules, and securely deliver clean data to your reporting platform via APIs and webhooks. Knowing Meridian's specific focus on reliable live-data pipelines and a smooth path to UAT, we are confident that Helios will equip your team with the visibility, control, and performance you require from day one.

To get started, we will be sending your access credentials and onboarding documentation in a separate email within the next 24 hours. In the meantime, here is a quick overview of our immediate next steps:

1. Please share Meridian's IT infrastructure diagram to help us finalize the integration environment setup (target date: 2026-07-12).
2. We ask that your team provision UAT environment access by 2026-07-19.
3. We will collaborate to resolve any remaining setup items ahead of the stakeholder demo on 2026-07-25.

If you have any technical questions, our Technical Lead, Derek Okafor, is available at d.okafor@novabridge.com. For project coordination, scheduling, or any other needs, please contact me directly at s.chen@novabridge.com. Both Derek and I are here to ensure this transition is as seamless as possible for you.

We look forward to a successful partnership with you and the entire Meridian team. Please do not hesitate to reach out if you need anything.

Best regards,

Sarah Chen
Project Manager, NovaBridge
s.chen@novabridge.com

content.text:
I have found the email draft in `client_onboarding_email_draft.txt`, reviewed its contents, and rewritten it to have a warmer, more professional, and personalized tone suited for an IT Lead. The revised draft has been saved back directly to the same file as requested. 

No further actions (like sending the email or scheduling meetings) were taken, honoring your strict instructions. Let me know if you need any other modifications!
